scope: v1 contract consumer evidence digest integrity
summary: v223 cross-checks the v220 evidence digest against the frozen v215 checklist and the focused v1 endpoint registry.
guards: v1 endpoint registry contains ten focused v1 contract endpoint/fixture pairs
consumer handoff bundle, checklist, and digest stay adjacent in order
digest checklist endpoint, fixture, evidence path, and receipt match the frozen v215 checklist
digest counts and blocked operations match the frozen v215 checklist
digestEvidence matches the frozen digest snapshot and excludes digest self/future receipts
digestChecks match the frozen digest snapshot
